rationale: First atom — H1 file root (§HO [HO — Examples]); verify h_lvl=1, sib_idx=1 universal precedent.
First H2 (## Example 1) at L3 — verify sib=1, parent=file root (NOT self-namespace), heading_level=2.
First SENTENCE atom inside Ex1 (L5) — verify parent_section transitions to §HO.1 [Example 1] sub-namespace per §2.5 convention.
Bold-caption SENTENCE **ho.xpt** at L17 — §R-D5 bold-caption SENTENCE accept (non-Note/Exception).
Last atom inside Ex1 (TABLE_ROW L53) — verify parent_section still §HO.1 before Ex2 boundary.
Second H2 (## Example 2) at L55 — verify sib=2, parent=file root, h_lvl=2; Ex2 boundary.
First atom inside Ex2 (SENTENCE L57, multi-clause narrative) — verify parent transitions to §HO.2 [Example 2].
Last atom of batch (TABLE_ROW L81 final suppho row) — verify parent §HO.2, atom_id continuity.
TABLE_HEADER (sib=null) — verify v1.9 standard 2-row span (line_end-line_start=1) per Hook A1/§R-D6, byte-exact 2-line verbatim.
TABLE_ROW with empty cells (L22 Row 2 NURSING HOME — HOSTDTC and HOENDTC empty between pipes) — verify Rule B byte-exact preservation of empty cells `| | | P6D |`.
Bold-caption SENTENCE `**Rows 1-2:** ...` at L7 — §R-D5 accept (non-Note caption ≠ HEADING/NOTE), verify caption is part of full sentence verbatim.
